# Google Search Console disavow file — mmg-lawfirm.com
# Generated from Semrush referring-domain audit (June 2026).
#
# WHAT THIS IS: a list of auto-generated scraper / spam directories pointing
# at mmg-lawfirm.com. These are the "118.139.x.x" Singapore-hosted link-
# farm cluster (linksnatcher.*, websiterace.com, getwebsiteworth.com, etc.)
# plus assorted parked/junk domains. They pass no value and exist only to
# scrape site stats.
#
# HOW TO USE: only upload this if Google Search Console flags a manual action
# or unnatural-links warning. Google generally ignores junk links on its own,
# so this is a LOW-PRIORITY, defensive file — not an emergency. Build real
# citations first (see citation-outreach-targets.md).
#
# Upload at: https://search.google.com/search-console/disavow-links
# Format: one "domain:<host>" per line disavows the entire domain.
#
# NOT disavowed (legitimate — left in place): superlawyers.com,
# expertise.com, clearwaylaw.com, motorcycleaccidentpros.com,
# top10accidentlawyers.com, toplawdog.com, losabogadoshispanos.us,
# mmg-lawfirm.com (self), mmglawfirm.squarespace.com (old site).
#
# Re-audit before uploading: run the Semrush backlinks_refdomains report
# again in case the list has grown or any entry has turned legitimate.
